title: Spear PvP +
description: The best texture pack to start Spear PVP
body:
⚔️ Spear PvP + ⚔️
Animated Spear PvP Texture Pack | 1.21.11
Spear PvP + is a high-impact, competitive PvP texture pack built for Minecraft 1.21.11, focused entirely on spear combat dominance. Featuring smooth animated textures, bold visuals, and a clean PvP-oriented design, this pack gives you the edge in every fight.
💥 Features
Custom spear textures designed for fast-paced PvP
Animated spear visuals that feel smooth and responsive
High-contrast, sharp colors for better tracking and timing
Clean, minimal style to reduce distractions
Optimized for stable FPS and competitive play
🔥 PvP Focused
Ideal for duels, SMP battles, and kit PvP servers
Animations enhance feedback without affecting gameplay
Built for precision, speed, and clarity
⚙️ Compatibility
Minecraft Java Edition 1.21.11
Works with OptiFine or Sodium (+ animation support)
100% server-friendly — no mods required

❤️ Credits
Texture & Animation: ThatMacer
Pack Concept & Design: ThatMacer

Special Thanks:

@BdizzleMc

@Masuno

@Mugm_

@Darkleonard

@thecleric

Tools Used: Paint.NET

⚠️ Do not reupload or claim as your own.
🎥 Showcases and videos are allowed with proper credit.
